---
title: "Exploratory Plots"
author: Natalie Novoseltseva
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo       
    code-fold: true    
    toc: true         
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
```

Data

```{r}
combined <- read_csv("Spring2026/data/joined_dataset.csv")

combined <-combined %>% 
  mutate(
  season_astro = case_when(
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-12-21")) | date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) ~ "Winter",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-03-20")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) ~ "Spring",
    date >= as.Date(paste0(year, "-06-21")) & date < as.Date(paste0(year, "-09-22")) ~ "Summer",
    TRUE ~ "Fall"
  )
)

combined <-combined %>%
  mutate(
    season_shift = case_when(
      month %in% 7:9  ~ "Summer",
      month %in% 10:12  ~ "Fall",
      month %in% 1:3 ~ "Winter",
      month %in% 4:6  ~ "Spring"
    )
  )
```

### Plots

#### Correlation matrix

```{r}
#select meaningful numeric variables
cor_vars <- combined %>%
  select(
    ATemp, RH, BP, WSpd, MaxWSpd, Wdir, SDWDir, TotPAR, TotPrcp,  #weather
    Temp, DO_mgl, DO_Pct, Sal, SpCond, pH, Turb, ChlFluor, Depth   #water
  ) %>%
  select(where(~sum(!is.na(.)) > 0))#remove NA columns

#compute correlation matrix
cor_matrix <- cor(cor_vars, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

#remove the upper triangle of the matrix
cor_matrix[upper.tri(cor_matrix)] <- NA

#melt for ggplot
cor_long <- melt(cor_matrix, na.rm = TRUE)
names(cor_long) <- c("Variable1", "Variable2", "Correlation")


#plot lower-triangle matrix
ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Variable1, y = Variable2, fill = Correlation)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#a6cee3", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#fb9a99", midpoint = 0) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Correlation, 2)), size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(title = "Correlation Matrix", fill = "r")
```

#### Relationship between the variables

##### Dissolved Oxygen mgl (DO_mgl)

```{r}
# Water Temperature and Dissolved Oxygen

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Temp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = DO_mgl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Water Temperature and DO by Season",
    x = "Water Temperature",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
test <- combined %>% 
  filter(year == 2009)
```

```{r}
# Water Temperature and Dissolved Oxygen (2009)

test %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Temp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = DO_mgl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Water Temperature and DO by Season (2009)",
    x = "Water Temperature",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
test_1 <- combined %>% 
  filter(year == 2009 & month == 5)
```

```{r}
# Water Temperature and Dissolved Oxygen (May, 2009)

test_1 %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Temp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = DO_mgl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Water Temperature and DO by Season (2009)",
    x = "Water Temperature",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

##### Total Precipitation (Totprc)

```{r}
#turbidity
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(Turb)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = Turb)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Turbidity by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Turbidity")
```

```{r}
#salinity
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(Sal)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Salinity by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Salinity")
```

```{r}
#specific conductivity
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(SpCond)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = SpCond)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Specific Conductivity by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Specific Conductivity")
```

```{r}
#dissolved oxygen
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(DO_mgl)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = DO_mgl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Dissolved Oxygen by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Dissolved Oxygen (mg/L)")
```

```{r}
#ChlFluor
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(ChlFluor)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = ChlFluor)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Chlorophyll Fluorescence by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "ChlFluor")
```

```{r}
#Depth
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(Depth)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = Depth)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Water Depth by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Depth")
```

```{r}
#Temperature
ggplot(combined %>% filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(Temp)),
       aes(x = TotPrcp, y = Temp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Total Precipitation vs Water Temperature by Season",
       x = "Total Precipitation (mm)", y = "Temperature")
```


##### Salinity (sal)

```{r}
#Temp

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Temperature and Salinity by Season",
    x = "Water Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Depth

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Depth), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Depth, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Depth and Salinity by Season",
    x = "Depth",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Turbidity

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Turb), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Turb, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Turbidity and Salinity by Season",
    x = "Turbidity",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Dissolved Oxygen

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Dissolved Oxygen and Salinity by Season",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#ChlFluor

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sal), !is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between ChlFluor and Salinity by Season",
    x = "ChlFluor",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

##### Air Temperature (Atemp)

```{r}
#Temp
combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(ATemp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ATemp, y = Temp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Water and Air Temperature by Season",
    x = "Air Temperature",
    y = "Water Temperature"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Salinity

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Sal), !is.na(ATemp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ATemp, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Salinity and Air Temperature by Season",
    x = "Air Temperature",
    y = "Salinity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Dissolved Oxygen

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(ATemp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ATemp, y = DO_mgl)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Dissolved Oxygen and Air Temperature by Season",
    x = "Air Temperature",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Total Precipitation

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(ATemp), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ATemp, y = TotPrcp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between Air Temperature and Total Precipitation by Season",
    x = "Air Temperature",
    y = "Dissolved Oxygen"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```


##### PH (ph)

```{r}
#Chlorophyll

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(pH), !is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = pH)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between PH and Chlorophyll by Season",
    x = "Chlorophyll",
    y = "ph"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#Dissolved Oxygen

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(pH), !is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = pH)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Relationship Between PH and Dissolved Oxygen by Season",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "ph"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

####Trends over time (STILL WORK IN PROGRESS!!!)

```{r}
#create the day of the year columns to try to proxy for time
combined <- combined %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(DateTimeStamp),
    doy = yday(DateTimeStamp),
    decimal_year = year + (doy - 1)/365
  )
```

```{r}
#detect daily temperature changes 
daily <- combined %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_ATemp = mean(ATemp, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_Prcp = sum(TotPrcp, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(decimal_year = year(date) + (yday(date)-1)/365)

daily <- daily %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    temp_change = abs(mean_ATemp - lag(mean_ATemp)),
    extreme_temp_change = temp_change > quantile(temp_change, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
#count the extreme temperature changes per month of each year
temp_extremes <- daily %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    extreme_changes = sum(extreme_temp_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_days = n(),
    rate = extreme_changes / n_days,
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#plot
temp_extremes <- temp_extremes %>%
  mutate(year_month = as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-")))

ggplot(temp_extremes, aes(x = year_month, y = rate)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Monthly Rate of Extreme Temperature Changes",
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion of Extreme Days")

temp_extremes <- temp_extremes %>%
  mutate(year_month = as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-")))

ggplot(temp_extremes, aes(x = year_month, y = rate)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Monthly Rate of Extreme Temperature Changes",
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion of Extreme Days")
```

```{r}
temp_extremes <- temp_extremes %>%
  mutate(
    season = case_when(
      month %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
      month %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
      month %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
      TRUE ~ "Fall"
    ),
    year_month = as.Date(paste(year, month, "01", sep = "-"))
  )

ggplot(temp_extremes, aes(x = year_month, y = rate)) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  #geom_line() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", color = "red") +
  facet_wrap(~season) +
  labs(title = "Monthly Rate of Extreme Temperature Changes by Season",
       x = "Time", y = "Proportion of Extreme Days") #change the title, violin plots for salinity (maybe recalculate salinity), affect of lagged percipitation on special conductivity
```


New Plots
```{r}
names(combined)
```

Recalculate the Salinity

```{r}
# Install if needed


library(gsw)

# Step 1: Convert specific conductance (25°C) → in-situ conductivity
combined$Cond_insitu <- combined$SpCond / (1 + 0.0191 * (combined$Temp - 25))

# Step 2: Recalculate salinity using PSS-78
combined$Sal_recalc <- gsw_SP_from_C(combined$Cond_insitu, combined$Temp, p = 0)

# Optional: remove intermediate column if you don’t need it
combined$Cond_insitu <- NULL
```

```{r}
#quality check
summary(combined$Sal)
summary(combined$Sal_recalc)

plot(combined$Sal, combined$Sal_recalc,
     xlab = "Original Salinity",
     ylab = "Recalculated Salinity",
     main = "Salinity Comparison")

abline(0, 1, col = "red", lwd = 2)
```

Salinity Plots with recalculated Salinity

Temperature

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Water Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Water Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```

Dissolved Oxygen

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```

Turbidity

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Turb), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Turb, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Turbidity",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Turb), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Turb, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Turbidity",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```



```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "ChlFluor",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "ChlFluor",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```


New plots
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

season_long <- combined %>%
  select(Temp, ATemp, season, season_astro, season_shift) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(season, season_astro, season_shift),
    names_to = "season_type",
    values_to = "season_label"
  )
```

```{r}
season_long %>%
  group_by(season_type, season_label) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_water_temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_air_temp   = mean(ATemp, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(season_long, aes(x = ATemp, y = Temp)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "blue") +
  facet_grid(season_label ~ season_type) +
  labs(
    x = "Air Temperature",
    y = "Water Temperature",
    title = "Air vs Water Temperature by Season Definition"
  )
```

```{r}
season_long_clean <- season_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(season_label))

ggplot(season_long_clean, aes(x = season_label, y = Temp, fill = season_type)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Average Water Temperature by Season Definition",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Average Water Temp"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(season_long_clean, aes(x = season_label, y = ATemp, fill = season_type)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Average Air Temperature by Season Definition")
```

```{r}
season_long <- combined %>%
  select(Temp, ATemp, DO_mgl, pH, Turb,
         season, season_astro, season_shift) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(season, season_astro, season_shift),
    names_to = "season_type",
    values_to = "season_label"
  )
```

```{r}
season_long %>%
  group_by(season_type, season_label) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_air  = mean(ATemp, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_DO   = mean(DO_mgl, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pH   = mean(pH, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
multi_long <- season_long %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Temp, ATemp, DO_mgl, pH),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(value), !is.na(season_label))

ggplot(multi_long, aes(x = season_label, y = value, fill = season_type)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar", position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~variable, scales = "free") +
  labs(title = "Average Values by Season Definition")
```
